visual_description: Hook visual: Invasive species: nature's wild card.

narration: They can disrupt ecosystems, outcompete native species, and alter food webs.
visual_description: Context visual: They can disrupt ecosystems, outcompete native species, and alter food webs.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: They can disrupt ecosystems, outcompete native species, and alter food webs.

narration: But here’s the twist: not all invasives are equally harmful. Some can even benefit their new environments!
visual_description: Escalation visual: But here’s the twist: not all invasives are equally harmful. Some can even benefit their new environments!
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But here’s the twist: not all invasives are equally harmful. Some can even benefit their new environments!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But here’s the twist: not all invasives are equally harmful. Some can even benefit their new environments!

narration: Studies show that certain invasive plants increase soil fertility, challenging the idea that all invasives are bad.
